name: Get Listed on TripAdvisor Management Centre
description: Not sure how to get your business on TripAdvisor? Here is our simple tutorial to get listed in TripAdvisor
main_title: Get listed on TripAdvisor Management Centre
richtext:
TripAdvisor is one of the largest travel sites that enables users to discover and book hotels and resorts across the globe. Users can also book flights, reserve restaurants, and join various activities and experiences through their site. Hosting over 600 million reviews and around 7.5 million accommodations, it has become one of the premier go-to sites for travel bookings.

To get your business listed on TripAdvisor, follow the below steps.
1. Find your business on tripadvisor.com, under the “Owners” Tab
2. Claim Your Business
3. Add Information about Your Business
4. Access the Management Subscription Page
5. Check Business Listing Rates


Step 1: Find your business

Go to tripadvisor.com. Select “Owners” option from the footer of the page.and search for your business using your “Phone No.” or “Business Name” and State.

Step 2: Claim Your Business (if it’s already listed)

If your business is already listed on TripAdvisor, you can claim your business by providing details like business mail id, business phone number and name. You will also be required to validate the information by choosing either Credit Card authentication or Facebook authentication. Once this authentication is complete, TripAdvisor will take you to “Business Management Centre”, a dashboard from which you can manage the presence of your business on TripAdvisor. Also, check step #4 to know more about management subscription.

Step 3: Add Information about your Business (if it is not listed)

If your business is not listed on TripAdvisor, go to TripAdvisor Owner’s page to add your business.Add all required information about your business like the address, contact number and geographical location. After you submit this form, TripAdvisor will take up to 5 days to cross check all information and list your business on the website.

Step 4: Access Management Subscription Page

You will be able to access the management subscription page after you receive an official confirmation from TripAdvisor regarding the business listing

Step 5: Check Business Listing Rates

f you are interested in getting more direct bookings from TripAdvisor, you can check out their business listing rates. To check out the rates for business listings, you must register as an authorized representative of a business. This facility will let you add direct contact details like mail address and phone number for your business on mobile site as well as website.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
